title: The Carousel Never Stops Turning
original_title: Mobil Bekas dan Kisah-Kisah dalam Putaran
overview: This film talks about today’s Indonesia from different perspectives—economy, politics, arts and culture, society, laws, and history—outlined in several fragments influenced by one another.
